channel.title: Latest from Android Central
channel.description: All the latest content from the Android Central team

item.title: Which Samsung Galaxy S26 model should you buy?
item.description: Samsung's Galaxy S26 family includes three phones again this year, but price hikes and a lack of upgrades on two models might just push you toward one.
item.dc:creator: Nicholas Sutrich

media:content.media:description: Samsung Galaxy S26, S26 Plus, and S26 Ultra
media:content.media:text: Samsung Galaxy S26, S26 Plus, and S26 Ultra
media:content.media:title: Samsung Galaxy S26, S26 Plus, and S26 Ultra

item.title: iPhone 17e vs. Google Pixel 10a: Two affordable flagships, one tough decision
item.description: Apple and Google are chasing the same buyer, just in very different ways.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: Google Pixel 10a in mint color in front of green leaves
media:content.media:text: Google Pixel 10a in mint color in front of green leaves
media:content.media:title: Google Pixel 10a in mint color in front of green leaves

item.title: Bridgerton lovers will adore this stunning collection of CASETiFY accessories
item.description: If Bridgerton has your heart in a chokehold, this CASETiFY collection of accessories will put a gigantic smile on your face and a dent in your wallet.
item.author: namerah.saud-fatmi@futurenet.com (Namerah Saud Fatmi)
item.dc:creator: Namerah Saud Fatmi

media:content.media:description: CASETiFY Bridgerton collection
media:content.media:text: CASETiFY Bridgerton collection
media:content.media:title: CASETiFY Bridgerton collection

item.title: Samsung already nuked the only cool thing about the Galaxy S26’s AI
item.description: Samsung’s first Galaxy S26 update removed the “Hey Plex” wake word for Perplexity AI, but it’s only temporary.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: Samsung Galaxy S26, S26 Plus, and S26 Ultra

media:content.media:title: Samsung Galaxy S26, S26 Plus, and S26 Ultra

item.title: Samsung allegedly tests insane Galaxy phone batteries, and one's really up there
item.description: A report claims Samsung has started testing batteries with huge capacities, which could arrive on future Galaxy phones and devices.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

item.title: I kept deleting chats by accident, and Google Messages just fixed it
item.description: Google Messages is rolling out a Trash folder that keeps deleted chats for 30 days, giving users a simple way to recover conversations.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: Google Messages blue logo

item.title: Best Buy is STILL selling the Galaxy S26 Ultra for just $399 with trade-in — plus get a $100 gift card, just for kicks
item.description: The preorder period may have come to a close, but you can still take advantage of Best Buy's impressive Galaxy S26 Ultra deal.
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

item.title: The best Samsung Galaxy S26 deals — free phones, gift cards, trade-in offers, and more

item.title: YouTube just approved 30-second unskippable ads for TV — this might be where I draw the line
item.description: YouTube may be the biggest streamer, but this move risks testing viewers' patience.

item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: YouTube app on Samsung TV

item.title: Your Google Pixel has a new Transit mode: Here's how to use it
item.description: Pixel's new Transit mode automates settings, filters notifications, and shows live updates to make daily commutes easier.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: Holding a Google Pixel 10 Pro XL while looking at the homescreen with weather and Gemini widgets on it

item.title: The best Garmin watch for most people has crashed to its lowest price ever during Amazon Spring Deal Days
item.description: The Garmin Venu 4 is our favorite watch from the manufacturer, and it just dropped to a record low price during Spring Deal Days.

item.title: Oura acquires Doublepoint, speculation goes wild with gesture control dreams
item.description: Oura announced that it has acquired Doublepoint, and it seems to point toward a future of smart ring gesture controls.

item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

item.title: I used the OPPO Find N6 — this is the creaseless foldable I've always wanted
item.description: I switched to the Find N6 as my daily driver, and this foldable has a unique feature: an entirely creaseless inner panel.

item.title: One UI 8.5 beta could land soon on the Galaxy Z Fold 7 and Flip 7

item.title: Samsung might let Galaxy users create apps with prompts, and I’m all for this direction

item.title: These hidden Galaxy S26 features will save your eyes while scrolling at night
item.description: Samsung's Galaxy S26 Ultra has a very bright display, but several hidden options can help make it far more comfortable.
item.dc:creator: Nicholas Sutrich

item.title: This OnePlus app is one built-in feature you're probably not using, but should be
item.description: One of the most useful yet underrated features of OnePlus phones is AI Recorder, which can come in handy for workers, students, and others in various scenarios.

item.dc:creator: Christine Persaud

item.title: Our favorite Amazfit smartwatch under $100 just got even cheaper at Amazon
item.description: The Amazfit Active 2 is an affordable device with a sporty, utilitarian look.
item.dc:creator: Zachary David

item.title: OPPO Find N6 is launching globally March 17, and I'm very excited about this feature
item.description: OPPO Find N6 is launching globally on March 17, and it is getting a Zero-Feel Crease that's designed to not have any visible crease on the inner panel.

item.title: This small change makes transferring data to your new Android phone a lot easier
item.description: Android has a built-in data transfer feature that's pretty great, and tweaks over the last two years have made it even better.

item.title: I used the TCL NXTPAPER 70 Pro's e-paper display, and I can't wait for the US launch next month
item.description: TCL is finally putting its matte, eye-friendly NXTPAPER display technology on a flagship available in the U.S., and I couldn't be more excited after trying it.
item.author: bradypsnyder@gmail.com (Brady Snyder)
item.dc:creator: Brady Snyder

media:content.media:description: The TCL NXTPAPER 70 Pro on display at MWC 2026.

item.title: I've done extensive testing on the Galaxy S26 Ultra's 8-bit display, and it isn't a big problem, but it could be
item.description: Samsung advertised the Galaxy S26 Ultra's display as 10-bit, but the company wasn't fully truthful and has since pulled back its rhetoric. Here's why that could be a problem.
item.dc:creator: Nicholas Sutrich
